title: Fix `Broken link in node` on interface modport import

features.name: interface with type parameter default value
features.description: Code should include an interface with a type parameter that has a default value

features.name: typedef inside interface
features.description: Code should include a typedef defined inside an interface body

features.name: function returning typedef type inside interface
features.description: Code should include a function inside an interface that returns a locally defined typedef type

features.name: modport with imported function
features.description: Code should include a modport that imports a function from the interface

features.name: interface instantiation with parameter override
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation that overrides the type parameter with a different value than the default

features.name: calling modport imported function in procedural context
features.description: Code should include calling an imported function from a modport inside a procedural statement like if
